bash_commands.command:
# Get all files from both directories
all_files=$(cat /workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/*.cpp /workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/IPO/*.cpp)

# Find unique files that contain INITIALIZE_PASS or FunctionPass or ModulePass or create*Pass
(grep -l "INITIALIZE_PASS" /workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/*.cpp /workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/IPO/*.cpp 2>/dev/null; \
 grep -l ": public FunctionPass\|: public ModulePass" /workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/*.cpp /workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/IPO/*.cpp 2>/dev/null; \
 grep -l "create[A-Z][a-zA-Z]*Pass(" /workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/*.cpp /workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/IPO/*.cpp 2>/dev/null) | sort | uniq

cat > /tmp/analyze_files.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

files=(
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/IPO/AlwaysInliner.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/IPO/BarrierNoopPass.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/IPO/DeadArgumentElimination.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/IPO/ExpandVariadics.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/IPO/GlobalDCE.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/IPO/Inliner.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/IPO/LoopExtractor.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/ConstantHoisting.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/DCE.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/DeadStoreElimination.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/EarlyCSE.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/FlattenCFGPass.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/GVN.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/InferAddressSpaces.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/InstSimplifyPass.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/LICM.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/LoopDataPrefetch.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/LoopStrengthReduce.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/LoopTermFold.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/LoopUnrollPass.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/LowerAtomicPass.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/MergeICmps.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/NaryReassociate.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/PartiallyInlineLibCalls.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/PlaceSafepoints.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/Reassociate.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/Reg2Mem.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/SROA.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/ScalarizeMaskedMemIntrin.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/Scalarizer.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/SeparateConstOffsetFromGEP.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/SimplifyCFGPass.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/Sink.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/SpeculativeExecution.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/StraightLineStrengthReduce.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/StructurizeCFG.cpp"
"/workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/TailRecursionElimination.cpp"
)

for file in "${files[@]}"; do
  echo "=== $(basename $file) ==="
  patterns=""
  
  if grep -q "INITIALIZE_PASS\|INITIALIZE_PASS_BEGIN\|INITIALIZE_PASS_END" "$file"; then
    patterns="$patterns INITIALIZE_PASS"
  fi
  
  if grep -q ": public FunctionPass\|: public ModulePass" "$file"; then
    patterns="$patterns FunctionPass/ModulePass"
  fi
  
  if grep -q "create[A-Z][a-zA-Z]*Pass(" "$file"; then
    patterns="$patterns create*Pass"
  fi
  
  echo "Patterns: $patterns"
done
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/analyze_files.sh
bash /tmp/analyze_files.sh

# Check which files have INITIALIZE_PASS_BEGIN/END vs INITIALIZE_PASS
for file in $(grep -l "INITIALIZE_PASS" /workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/*.cpp /workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/llvm/lib/Transforms/IPO/*.cpp 2>/dev/null); do
  if grep -q "INITIALIZE_PASS_BEGIN" "$file"; then
    echo "INIT_BEGIN/END: $(basename $file)"
  else
    echo "INIT_PASS: $(basename $file)"
  fi
done | sort

# Get the repository information
ls -la /workspace/llvm-project--a8f3c97d/ | head -20
python3 -m json.tool /workspace/answer.json > /dev/null && echo "JSON is valid" && wc -l /workspace/answer.json

# Verify count of files in JSON
grep -c '"path":' /workspace/answer.json && echo "---" && \
# Spot check a few files
echo "Spot checks:" && \
grep "ConstantHoisting\|PlaceSafepoints\|Inliner" /workspace/answer.json | head -5

  ],
  "text": "Found 37 C++ source files in llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/ and llvm/lib/Transforms/IPO/ directories that contain legacy pass manager infrastructure. These files use one or more of the following deprecated patterns:\n\n**INITIALIZE_PASS macros (30 files):**\nAll 30 files use either INITIALIZE_PASS or INITIALIZE_PASS_BEGIN/INITIALIZE_PASS_END macros. 29 files use the BEGIN/END variant: ConstantHoisting.cpp, DeadStoreElimination.cpp, EarlyCSE.cpp, FlattenCFGPass.cpp, GVN.cpp, InferAddressSpaces.cpp, InstSimplifyPass.cpp, LICM.cpp, LoopDataPrefetch.cpp, LoopStrengthReduce.cpp, LoopTermFold.cpp, LoopUnrollPass.cpp, MergeICmps.cpp, NaryReassociate.cpp, PartiallyInlineLibCalls.cpp, PlaceSafepoints.cpp, Reg2Mem.cpp, SROA.cpp, ScalarizeMaskedMemIntrin.cpp, Scalarizer.cpp, SeparateConstOffsetFromGEP.cpp, SimplifyCFGPass.cpp, Sink.cpp, SpeculativeExecution.cpp, StraightLineStrengthReduce.cpp, StructurizeCFG.cpp, TailRecursionElimination.cpp in Scalar, and AlwaysInliner.cpp, LoopExtractor.cpp in IPO. The single INITIALIZE_PASS variant is used in: BarrierNoopPass.cpp, DCE.cpp, DeadArgumentElimination.cpp, ExpandVariadics.cpp, GlobalDCE.cpp, LowerAtomicPass.cpp, and Reassociate.cpp.\n\n**FunctionPass/ModulePass inheritance (27 files):**\n27 files directly inherit from FunctionPass or ModulePass legacy base classes. These are: ConstantHoisting.cpp, DCE.cpp, DeadStoreElimination.cpp, EarlyCSE.cpp, FlattenCFGPass.cpp, GVN.cpp, InferAddressSpaces.cpp, InstSimplifyPass.cpp, LoopDataPrefetch.cpp, LowerAtomicPass.cpp, MergeICmps.cpp, NaryReassociate.cpp, PartiallyInlineLibCalls.cpp, Reassociate.cpp, Reg2Mem.cpp, SROA.cpp, ScalarizeMaskedMemIntrin.cpp, Scalarizer.cpp, SeparateConstOffsetFromGEP.cpp, SimplifyCFGPass.cpp, Sink.cpp, SpeculativeExecution.cpp, StraightLineStrengthReduce.cpp, TailRecursionElimination.cpp in Scalar, and AlwaysInliner.cpp, BarrierNoopPass.cpp, DeadArgumentElimination.cpp, ExpandVariadics.cpp, GlobalDCE.cpp, LoopExtractor.cpp in IPO. Note that LICM.cpp, LoopTermFold.cpp, and PlaceSafepoints.cpp in Scalar use INITIALIZE_PASS macros but do not directly inherit from FunctionPass/ModulePass in their class definitions.\n\n**create*Pass() factory functions (36 files):**\n36 files define legacy pass factory functions (e.g., createConstantHoistingPass(), createDCEPass()). Only PlaceSafepoints.cpp does not define such a factory function. These factory functions return FunctionPass* or ModulePass* pointers and represent the old-style pass registration pattern.\n\n**Migration Status by Directory:**\n- Scalar transforms: 30 files with legacy patterns (ConstantHoisting, DCE, DeadStoreElimination, EarlyCSE, FlattenCFGPass, GVN, InferAddressSpaces, InstSimplifyPass, LICM, LoopDataPrefetch, LoopStrengthReduce, LoopTermFold, LoopUnrollPass, LowerAtomicPass, MergeICmps, NaryReassociate, PartiallyInlineLibCalls, PlaceSafepoints, Reassociate, Reg2Mem, SROA, ScalarizeMaskedMemIntrin, Scalarizer, SeparateConstOffsetFromGEP, SimplifyCFGPass, Sink, SpeculativeExecution, StraightLineStrengthReduce, StructurizeCFG, TailRecursionElimination)\n- IPO transforms: 7 files with legacy patterns (AlwaysInliner, BarrierNoopPass, DeadArgumentElimination, ExpandVariadics, GlobalDCE, Inliner, LoopExtractor)\n\nThese files require migration to the new pass manager infrastructure to complete the LLVM modernization effort."
}

conversation_events.text:
# LLVM Legacy Pass Manager to New Pass Manager Migration Inventory

## Your Task

LLVM has been migrating from the legacy pass manager to the new pass manager. Find C++ source files in `llvm/llvm-project` under `llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/` and `llvm/lib/Transforms/IPO/` that still contain references to legacy pass manager infrastructure. Specifically, find files that: 1. Use `INITIALIZE_PASS` or `INITIALIZE_PASS_BEGIN`/`INITIALIZE_PASS_END` macros. 2. Inherit from `FunctionPass` or `ModulePass` (legacy base classes). 3. Define `create*Pass()` factory functions (legacy registration pattern). Report each file path and which legacy patterns it uses.

## Context

You are working on a codebase task involving repos from the migration domain.

## Available Resources

The local `/workspace/` directory contains: sg-evals/llvm-project--a8f3c97d, sg-evals/gcc--96dfb333.

**Note:** Additional repositories are accessible via Sourcegraph MCP tools:
- `sg-evals/llvm-project--a8f3c97d` (llvm/llvm-project)
- `sg-evals/gcc--96dfb333` (gcc-mirror/gcc)

## Output Format

Create a file at `/workspace/answer.json` with your findings in the following structure:

```json
{
  "files": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go"}
  ],
  "symbols": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go", "symbol": "SymbolName"}
  ],
  "chain": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go", "symbol": "FunctionName"}
  ],
  "text": "Narrative explanation of your findings, citing repos and file paths."
}
```

Include only the fields relevant to this task. Your answer is evaluated against a closed-world oracle — completeness matters.

## Evaluation

Your answer will be scored on:
- **File recall and precision**: Did you find all relevant files?
I'll help you find the legacy pass manager references in the LLVM codebase. Let me start by exploring the repository structure and then search for the specific patterns.
Now let me analyze each file to determine exactly which legacy patterns it contains:
Perfect! Now let me verify a few files to understand the exact patterns and create the comprehensive JSON output:
Now let me create the comprehensive answer JSON file:
Let me verify the JSON is properly formatted and complete:
Let me verify the count and do a final check on a couple of files to ensure accuracy:

Perfect! I have successfully completed the LLVM Legacy Pass Manager migration inventory task.

## Summary

I found **37 C++ source files** containing legacy pass manager infrastructure in the LLVM codebase:

### Distribution:
- **30 files** in `llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/`
- **7 files** in `llvm/lib/Transforms/IPO/`

### Legacy Patterns Identified:

1. **INITIALIZE_PASS macros** (30 files):
   - 29 files use `INITIALIZE_PASS_BEGIN`/`INITIALIZE_PASS_END`
   - 7 files use `INITIALIZE_PASS`

2. **FunctionPass/ModulePass inheritance** (27 files):
   - Files directly inherit from legacy base classes
   - Notably, LICM.cpp, LoopTermFold.cpp, and PlaceSafepoints.cpp don't inherit from these but still use INITIALIZE_PASS macros

3. **create*Pass() factory functions** (36 files):
   - Legacy pass registration pattern
   - Only PlaceSafepoints.cpp lacks this pattern

### Key Files in Scalar:
ConstantHoisting, DCE, DeadStoreElimination, EarlyCSE, FlattenCFGPass, GVN, InferAddressSpaces, InstSimplifyPass, LICM, LoopDataPrefetch, LoopStrengthReduce, LoopTermFold, LoopUnrollPass, LowerAtomicPass, MergeICmps, NaryReassociate, PartiallyInlineLibCalls, PlaceSafepoints, Reassociate, Reg2Mem, SROA, ScalarizeMaskedMemIntrin, Scalarizer, SeparateConstOffsetFromGEP, SimplifyCFGPass, Sink, SpeculativeExecution, StraightLineStrengthReduce, StructurizeCFG, TailRecursionElimination

### Key Files in IPO:
AlwaysInliner, BarrierNoopPass, DeadArgumentElimination, ExpandVariadics, GlobalDCE, Inliner, LoopExtractor

The complete findings have been saved to `/workspace/answer.json`.

  "text": "Found 37 C++ source files in llvm/lib/Transforms/Scalar/ and llvm/lib/Transforms/IPO/ directories that contain legacy pass manager infrastructure. These files use one or more of the following deprecated patterns:\n\n**INITIALIZE_PASS macros (30 files):**\nAll 30 files use either INITIALIZE_PASS or INITIALIZE_PASS_BEGIN/INITIALIZE_PASS_END macros. 29 files use the BEGIN/END variant: ConstantHoisting.cpp, DeadStoreElimination.cpp, EarlyCSE.cpp, FlattenCFGPass.cpp, GVN.cpp, InferAddressSpaces.cpp, InstSimplifyPass.cpp, LICM.cpp, LoopDataPrefetch.cpp, LoopStrengthReduce.cpp, LoopTermFold.cpp, LoopUnrollPass.cpp, MergeICmps.cpp, NaryReassociate.cpp, PartiallyInlineLibCalls.cpp, PlaceSafepoints.cpp, Reg2Mem.cpp, SROA.cpp, ScalarizeMaskedMemIntrin.cpp, Scalarizer.cpp, SeparateConstOffsetFromGEP.cpp, SimplifyCFGPass.cpp, Sink.cpp, SpeculativeExecution.cpp, StraightLineStrengthReduce.cpp, StructurizeCFG.cpp, TailRecursionElimination.cpp in Scalar, and AlwaysInliner.cpp, LoopExtractor.cpp in IPO. The single INITIALIZE_PASS variant is used in: BarrierNoopPass.cpp, DCE.cpp, DeadArgumentElimination.cpp, ExpandVariadics.cpp, GlobalDCE.cpp, LowerAtomicPass.cpp, and Reassociate.cpp.\n\n**FunctionPass/ModulePass inheritance (27 files):**\n27 files directly inherit from FunctionPass or ModulePass legacy base classes. These are: ConstantHoisting.cpp, DCE.cpp, DeadStoreElimination.cpp, EarlyCSE.cpp, FlattenCFGPass.cpp, GVN.cpp, InferAddressSpaces.cpp, InstSimplifyPass.cpp, LoopDataPrefetch.cpp, LowerAtomicPass.cpp, MergeICmps.cpp, NaryReassociate.cpp, PartiallyInlineLibCalls.cpp, Reassociate.cpp, Reg2Mem.cpp, SROA.cpp, ScalarizeMaskedMemIntrin.cpp, Scalarizer.cpp, SeparateConstOffsetFromGEP.cpp, SimplifyCFGPass.cpp, Sink.cpp, SpeculativeExecution.cpp, StraightLineStrengthReduce.cpp, TailRecursionElimination.cpp in Scalar, and AlwaysInliner.cpp, BarrierNoopPass.cpp, DeadArgumentElimination.cpp, ExpandVariadics.cpp, GlobalDCE.cpp, LoopExtractor.cpp in IPO. Note that LICM.cpp, LoopTermFold.cpp, and PlaceSafepoints.cpp in Scalar use INITIALIZE_PASS macros but do not directly inherit from FunctionPass/ModulePass in their class definitions.\n\n**create*Pass() factory functions (36 files):**\n36 files define legacy pass factory functions (e.g., createConstantHoistingPass(), createDCEPass()). Only PlaceSafepoints.cpp does not define such a factory function. These factory functions return FunctionPass* or ModulePass* pointers and represent the old-style pass registration pattern.\n\n**Migration Status by Directory:**\n- Scalar transforms: 30 files with legacy patterns (ConstantHoisting, DCE, DeadStoreElimination, EarlyCSE, FlattenCFGPass, GVN, InferAddressSpaces, InstSimplifyPass, LICM, LoopDataPrefetch, LoopStrengthReduce, LoopTermFold, LoopUnrollPass, LowerAtomicPass, MergeICmps, NaryReassociate, PartiallyInlineLibCalls, PlaceSafepoints, Reassociate, Reg2Mem, SROA, ScalarizeMaskedMemIntrin, Scalarizer, SeparateConstOffsetFromGEP, SimplifyCFGPass, Sink, SpeculativeExecution, StraightLineStrengthReduce, StructurizeCFG, TailRecursionElimination)\n- IPO transforms: 7 files with legacy patterns (AlwaysInliner, BarrierNoopPass, DeadArgumentElimination, ExpandVariadics, GlobalDCE, Inliner, LoopExtractor)\n\nThese files require migration to the new pass manager infrastructure to complete the LLVM modernization effort."
}
